children.text: I'm Li Hua, and my favourite way to keep fit is playing basketball.
children.keywords: Li Hua, favourite way, keep fit

children.text: I usually play it three times a week with my best friends after school.
children.keywords: usually, three times a week, best friends

children.text: We often work as a team and have fun together on the court.
children.keywords: work as a team, have fun

children.text: I like basketball because it provides many benefits for my body and mind.
For example, it makes me feel relaxed and full of energy when I am tired.
children.keywords: for example, relaxed, full of energy

children.text: What's more, it keeps me healthy and helps me to keep a good weight.
There are several advantages that I can get from doing sports.
Besides making new friends, it also builds my team spirit and confidence.
children.keywords: besides, new friends, team spirit, confidence

children.text: In short, health is wealth, and sports really make my life more wonderful!
children.keywords: in short, health is wealth, wonderful life
